title: Vow To Venus
content:
Happily I had a sight
Of my dearest dear last night;
Make her this day smile on me,
And I'll roses give to thee!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Vow To Venus"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
